reference: I have been an asthma patient for a very long time, but I experience more frequent symptoms during the winter season, including morning cough lasting for five to ten minutes. The prolonged coughing has created a slipped disc affecting my leg. I have taken an X-ray as advised by doctors, but I am feeling numbness in the foot of my right leg.
